commands.review_summary:
The PR removes stale Convex maintenance backfills and their admin HTTP/CLI/schema/docs/test surfaces while keeping a narrower legacy publisher ownership repair path.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR removes stale maintenance surfaces rather than fixing a reported runtime bug. Source inspection on the PR head confirms the targeted symbols are removed except for the retained canary repair path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is collaborator-authored and needs maintainer/operator confirmation for compatibility rather than an automated repair.

target.title: chore: remove stale maintenance backfills
target.body:
## Summary
- Remove completed/stale Convex maintenance backfills for publisher ownership, skill/package search digests, embedding maps, and package artifact kinds.
- Remove the obsolete package artifact backfill HTTP/admin CLI surface and schema exports.
- Keep the targeted legacy publisher ownership repair path and update tests/docs around that smaller canary-only tool.

## Validation
- `bunx convex codegen`
- `rg -n "repairLegacyPublisherOwnership\\b|backfillEmbeddingSkillMapInternal|backfillSkillSearchDigestInternal|backfillPackagePluginCategoryDigestsInternal|backfillDigestOwnerFields|stopBackfillDigestOwnerFieldsStatus|stopBackfillDigestOwnerFields|backfillDigestOwnerFieldsStatus|backfillDigestVersionSummary|backfillDigestIsSuspicious|backfillDigestNormalizedSearchFields|backfillPackageArtifactKindsInternal|PackageArtifactBackfill|cmdBackfillPackageArtifacts|backfill/artifacts|backfill-artifacts" convex src packages docs specs` (no matches)
- `git diff --check`
- `bunx vitest run convex/maintenance.test.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts packages/clawhub/src/cli/commands/packages.test.ts`
- `(cd packages/clawhub && bunx vitest run -c vitest.config.ts src/cli/commands/packages.test.ts)`
- `bun run format:check -- convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/httpApiV1/packagesV1.ts convex/maintenance.test.ts convex/maintenance.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts convex/packages.ts docs/http-api.md packages/clawhub-mod/README.md packages/clawhub-mod/src/cli.ts packages/clawhub-mod/src/commands/packages.ts packages/clawhub/src/cli/commands/packages.test.ts packages/clawhub/src/schema/packages.ts packages/schema/src/packages.ts specs/orgs.md`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bun run ci:types-build`
- `bun run ci:packages`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (no actionable findings)
target.author: patrick-erichsen

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
